summary: The Agent inferred life expectancies around those times by analyzing general trends discussed across multiple documents, noting persistent differences where females generally lived longer than males even if precise numbers weren't available for every year or group specified precisely. Based on these indirect observations, they chose an answer aligned most likely given known patterns up until more recently updated statistics could be consulted accurately. To improve precision next steps should include checking newer databases like World Bank reports which track yearly updates reliably since then potentially narrowing down estimates further compared
